name: Random Picker
blurb: Spin the wheel to pick who goes next. Everyone's a slice.

name: Disordered Order
blurb: Crack the hidden emoji order — we only tell you how many sit in the right spot.

name: Beopardy
blurb: Buzz in from your phone. Daily Doubles, Final Beopardy, zero lawsuits.

name: Two Truths & a Lie
blurb: Submit three statements, the room guesses the lie.

name: Punchline
blurb: One prompt. Your funniest answer. The room votes.

name: Buzzword Bingo
blurb: Mark the buzzwords as they get dropped. First to a line wins.
